name: Men's Plastic Retro Browline Square Sunglasses - Goodfellow & Co™ Charcoal Gray: Maximum UV Protection, Impact-Resistant
description: Sport a retro-style look during your sunny day outings with the Plastic Retro Browline Square Sunglasses from Goodfellow & Co™. These square sunglasses have a charcoal gray browline for a stylish appeal and brown lenses with a UV protection feature. Made with a plastic frame for a lightweight feel, these retro sunglasses fit narrow faces.
